AlertRule.title: AlertRule

EventKind.title: EventKind

Sensor.title: Sensor

SensorRegisterResponse.title: SensorRegisterResponse

get.description:
List observed access points.

Args:
    _: Current user.
    store: Application store.
    limit: Page size.
    offset: Page offset.

Returns:
    Paginated access point list.

Return one access point.

Args:
    bssid: BSSID.
    _: Current user.
    store: Application store.

Returns:
    Access point.

List client devices associated with one access point.

Args:
    bssid: Access point BSSID.
    _: Current user.
    store: Application store.
    limit: Page size.
    offset: Page offset.

Returns:
    Paginated associated client list.

List alerts with severity and acknowledgement filters.

Args:
    _: Current user.
    store: Application store.
    severity: Optional repeated severity filter.
    acked: Optional acknowledgement-state filter.
    limit: Page size.
    offset: Page offset.

Returns:
    Paginated alert list.

List alert rules.

Args:
    _: Current user.
    store: Application store.
    limit: Page size.
    offset: Page offset.

Returns:
    Paginated alert-rule list.

post.description:
Create an alert rule.

Args:
    payload: Rule payload.
    user: Current admin with verified TOTP.
    store: Application store.
    audit: Audit logger.

Returns:
    Created alert rule.

delete.description:
Delete an alert rule.

Args:
    rule_id: Alert rule identifier.
    user: Current admin with verified TOTP.
    store: Application store.
    audit: Audit logger.

patch.description:
Update an alert rule.

Args:
    rule_id: Alert rule identifier.
    payload: Rule update payload.
    user: Current admin with verified TOTP.
    store: Application store.
    audit: Audit logger.

Returns:
    Updated alert rule.

post.description:
Acknowledge an alert.

Args:
    alert_id: Alert identifier.
    user: Current user.
    store: Application store.
    audit: Audit logger.

get.description:
List audit entries.

Args:
    _: Current admin with verified TOTP.
    store: Application store.
    limit: Page size.
    offset: Page offset.

Returns:
    Paginated audit entries.

post.description:
Create or return a TOTP secret for the current user.

Args:
    user: Current user.
    store: Application store.
    totp: TOTP service.

Returns:
    TOTP setup data.

Verify TOTP for the current user.

Args:
    payload: TOTP code payload.
    user: Current user.
    store: Application store.
    totp: TOTP service.

Returns:
    Updated public user.

Authenticate a user and set secure cookies.

Args:
    payload: Login payload.
    response: FastAPI response.
    store: Application store.
    passwords: Password service.
    csrf: CSRF service.
    tokens: Token service.
    settings: Runtime settings.

Returns:
    Public user and CSRF token.

Clear browser session cookies and record a logout audit event.

Args:
    response: FastAPI response.
    user: Current authenticated user.
    audit: Audit logger.
    settings: Runtime settings.

Refresh an authenticated browser session.

Args:
    request: FastAPI request.
    response: FastAPI response.
    store: Application store.
    csrf: CSRF service.
    tokens: Token service.
    settings: Runtime settings.

Returns:
    Public user and new CSRF token.

Register the first admin or an admin-created user.

Args:
    payload: Registration payload.
    request: FastAPI request.
    store: Application store.
    passwords: Password service.
    tokens: Token service.

Returns:
    Created public user.

get.description:
List observed client devices.

Args:
    _: Current user.
    store: Application store.
    limit: Page size.
    offset: Page offset.

Returns:
    Paginated client list.

Return one client device.

Args:
    mac: Client MAC.
    _: Current user.
    store: Application store.

Returns:
    Client device.

post.description:
Create an engagement.

Args:
    payload: Engagement payload.
    _: Current admin with verified TOTP.
    store: Application store.

Returns:
    Created engagement.

Add a target to an engagement allow-list.

Args:
    engagement_id: Engagement identifier.
    payload: Target payload.
    _: Current admin with verified TOTP.
    store: Application store.

get.description:
List events.

Args:
    _: Current user.
    store: Application store.
    limit: Page size.
    offset: Page offset.

Returns:
    Paginated event list.

Return one event.

Args:
    event_id: Event identifier.
    _: Current user.
    store: Application store.

Returns:
    Event.

List sensors.

Args:
    _: Current admin with verified TOTP.
    store: Application store.

Returns:
    Paginated sensor list.

post.description:
Register a sensor and issue client certificate material.

Args:
    payload: Sensor registration payload.
    _: Current admin with verified TOTP.
    store: Application store.

Returns:
    Registered sensor and certificate bundle.

get.description:
Return one sensor.

Args:
    sensor_id: Sensor identifier.
    _: Current admin with verified TOTP.
    store: Application store.

Returns:
    Sensor record.

post.description:
Revoke a sensor.

Args:
    sensor_id: Sensor identifier.
    _: Current admin with verified TOTP.
    store: Application store.

Create the one-time authorized-operator acknowledgement.

Args:
    payload: Typed legal statement.
    user: Current admin with verified TOTP.
    store: Application store.
    audit: Audit logger.

Returns:
    Stored acknowledgement.

get.description:
Return process health.

Returns:
    Health status payload.

Return Prometheus-style metrics.

Returns:
    Plain-text metrics response.
